name: /agent-verify exits two when the verifier emits no verdict: agree|disagree line per the F-3 verdict-required contract
command:
printf 'diff stub
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "some unrelated output"
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'no .verdict' err.txt && echo missing 1>&2
